subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of God from the Lote-Tree of Light, appearing in the form of fire, hath verily been witnessed from the direction of the Throne, and behold, it hath been unveiled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله من سدره النور علی هیئه النار قد کان عن جهه العرش مشهودا و انه قد کشف
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power of prayer, @prophecy and fulfillment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
